This directory contains a vendored copy of code from:
https://github.com/storpool/any2kvm

The sesparse utility is a critical dependency for OneSwap delta migration workflows.

Modifications maintained by OpenNebula Systems:
- Added support for seSparse images with reserved1=0x200

Based on the patch proposed in:
https://github.com/storpool/any2kvm/pull/1

The upstream project appears inactive and the required fix has not been merged upstream.

Original license and copyright notices are preserved.
